instruction:
A and B, two basketball players, have shooting accuracies of 0.7 and 0.6 respectively. Each player shoots three times. What is the probability that both players score an equal number of baskets?

Options:
A. $$
0. 3 0 0 7 6
$$
B. $$
0. 3 1 0 7 6
$$
C. $$
0. 3 2 0 7 5
$$
D. $$
0. 3 2 2 7 6
$$
E. $$
0. 1 2 0 7 6
$$
F. $$
0. 2 2 0 7 6
$$
G. $$
0. 3 2 0 7 6
$$
H. $$
0. 3 2 0 6 6
$$
I. $$
0. 0 2 0 7 6
$$
J. $$
0. 3 2 1 7 6
$$
